---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PQCScanner
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "When scanning large monorepos, there is no way to ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other information, mockups, or references that help explain the request. Links to relevant NIST standards or PQC specifications are welcome.
